items.name: Nebula Wake
items.description: Slow-rolling nebula gas trail in pink and cyan, leaving a wide dispersing cloud behind.
items.flavor_text: A small weather system tagging along. It leaves when the engine cools.
items.art_prompt_hints: engine exhaust trail, slow rolling nebula gas, pink and cyan dispersing cloud, atmospheric and cosmic

items.name: Solar Flare Trail
items.description: Intense solar-flare exhaust with arc loops and bright yellow-white core. Reads loud on every scanner.
items.flavor_text: Borrowed the behavior of a star. The star has not asked for it back.
items.art_prompt_hints: engine exhaust trail, solar flare plume with arc loops and bright yellow-white core, stellar phenomenon, intense

items.name: Cosmic Ribbon
items.description: Thin ribbon-like exhaust that curls and braids as the ship turns, tracing the flight path.
items.flavor_text: A signature written in space. It fades before anyone gets around to reading it.
items.art_prompt_hints: engine exhaust trail, thin ribbon curling and braiding with turns, iridescent trace, graceful and elegant

items.name: Ion Storm Trail
items.description: Ion-storm exhaust with forked lightning arcs branching out from the central plume.
items.flavor_text: The ion storm had nowhere to go. The engine offered a ride, briefly.
items.art_prompt_hints: engine exhaust trail, ion plume with forked lightning arcs branching outward, electric tempest, dangerous

items.name: Reactor Glow Purple
items.description: Deep purple reactor-core glow visible through the engine intake vents at all speeds.
items.flavor_text: The reactor glows the color the engineer dreamed about. Approved on the second submission.
items.art_prompt_hints: reactor core glow through engine intake vents, deep violet purple, emissive with soft bloom, sci-fi interior tech

items.name: Reactor Glow Green
items.description: Toxic-green reactor glow through the vents and intake ports. Warning color, worn proudly.
items.flavor_text: Green reactors are illegal in twelve sectors. Seven of those will never find out.
items.art_prompt_hints: reactor core glow through engine intake vents, toxic radioactive green, emissive with soft bloom, hazardous mood

items.name: Reactor Glow White
items.description: Pure white reactor glow visible through the vents. Intensifies during boost, dim at cruise.
items.flavor_text: The reactor runs hot and honest. Nothing is pretending in there.
items.art_prompt_hints: reactor core glow through engine intake vents, pure white-hot incandescence, emissive bloom, technical and powerful

items.name: Reactor Glow Cyan
items.description: Cold cyan reactor glow with thin frost-like filaments webbing outward from the vent grates.
items.flavor_text: A reactor running cold enough to be suspicious. Nobody asks the engineer about it.
items.art_prompt_hints: reactor core glow through engine intake vents, cold cyan with frost filament webbing, emissive crystalline, chilled and ominous

items.name: Engine Flame Purple
items.description: Deep purple flames licking out of the main engine cone. Warmer at idle, fiercer at boost.
items.flavor_text: Purple fire looks polite. It is not. Ask the nearest scorch mark.
items.art_prompt_hints: engine cone flame emitter, deep purple flames licking outward, heat shimmer at base, vivid and royal

items.name: Engine Flame Green
items.description: Emerald-green flames from the engine cone with slight forked tongue behavior at boost.
items.flavor_text: Green fire. The engineer submitted paperwork. The paperwork is still in transit.
items.art_prompt_hints: engine cone flame emitter, emerald green flames with forked tongues at boost, heat shimmer, mystical and dangerous

items.name: Engine Flame White
items.description: Blinding white engine flame, narrow and tight at the cone. The pilot's premium burn.
items.flavor_text: Burns too clean. The flight log says so, pretends not to mind.
items.art_prompt_hints: engine cone flame emitter, blinding narrow white flame, tight focused burn, pure and aggressive

items.name: Engine Flame Cyan
items.description: Icy cyan flames licking from the engine cone, suggesting cryogenic fuel rather than standard burn.
items.flavor_text: Flame that feels colder than the cockpit. The pilot does not question fuel choices.
items.art_prompt_hints: engine cone flame emitter, icy cyan flames with cryo frost tongues, heat shimmer reversed to cold shimmer, chilled

items.name: Muzzle Flash Red
items.description: Crimson muzzle flash on every weapon trigger. Sharp petal-shaped burst, brief afterglow.
items.flavor_text: Red is not for aiming. Red is for the other pilot to remember you.
items.art_prompt_hints: weapon muzzle flash effect, crimson petal-shaped burst with brief afterglow, sharp and aggressive

items.name: Muzzle Flash Blue
items.description: Cold blue muzzle flash with a small shockwave halo. Reads technical, scans precise.
items.flavor_text: The flash says precision. The crater after disagrees. Both are correct.
items.art_prompt_hints: weapon muzzle flash effect, cold blue burst with shockwave halo ring, precise and technical

items.name: Muzzle Flash Green
items.description: Acid green muzzle flash with small drifting sparks. Feels like something leaked that shouldn't have.
items.flavor_text: The flash is toxic-colored. The ammunition is not. Usually. The pilot signed.
items.art_prompt_hints: weapon muzzle flash effect, acid green burst with drifting spark particles, toxic-tinted and uneasy

items.name: Muzzle Flash Yellow
items.description: Bright solar yellow muzzle flash that feels more like a camera flashbulb than a gun.
items.flavor_text: The flash is so bright it arrives before the shot. Eyewitnesses vary.
items.art_prompt_hints: weapon muzzle flash effect, bright solar yellow burst, flashbulb quality, loud and theatrical

items.name: Shield Bubble Blue
items.description: Classic blue shield bubble with hexagonal cell pattern. Flashes brighter on impact.
items.flavor_text: Blue is the color the shield wants to be. Most of the time it succeeds.
items.art_prompt_hints: shield bubble effect, blue hexagonal cell pattern, impact flash highlights, classic force-field aesthetic

items.name: Shield Bubble Pink
items.description: Rose-pink shield bubble with small heart-shaped ripples on impact. Disarmingly cute.
items.flavor_text: The shield took a personality test. Came back charming, still keeps incoming fire out.
items.art_prompt_hints: shield bubble effect, rose pink cell pattern with heart-shaped impact ripples, cute and disarming

items.name: Shield Bubble Amber
items.description: Amber shield bubble with warm honey glow and soft radial ripples on impact.
items.flavor_text: Warm color for a cold duty. The shield clocks in every single time.
items.art_prompt_hints: shield bubble effect, amber honey glow with soft radial impact ripples, warm and steady

items.name: Shield Bubble Green
items.description: Lime green shield bubble with slower rippling hexagons. A faintly sick color on good days.
items.flavor_text: Green shield for the pilot who finds warnings charming. The shield obliges.
items.art_prompt_hints: shield bubble effect, lime green hexagonal pattern with slow rippling cells, queasy and distinctive

items.name: Exhaust Smoke Trail
items.description: Thick grey exhaust smoke drifting lazily behind the engine. Low-tech and proud of it.
items.flavor_text: A trail that lingers in space longer than it should. The pilot likes that.
items.art_prompt_hints: engine exhaust trail, thick grey drifting smoke plume, lazy diffusion, industrial low-tech mood

items.name: Neon Underglow Pink
items.description: Pink neon underglow light rig beneath the hull. Casts pink shadows on docking floors.
items.flavor_text: The hull rolls into port with a color the dock crews have started gossiping about.
items.art_prompt_hints: underhull neon light rig, pink glow casting onto docking floor, street-race aesthetic, confident and flashy

items.name: Neon Underglow Cyan
items.description: Cyan neon underglow illuminating the hull underside and throwing cyan halo on nearby surfaces.
items.flavor_text: Lights under a ship say things about the pilot. The dock lights agree quietly.
items.art_prompt_hints: underhull neon light rig, cyan glow casting halo on docking floor, tech-racer aesthetic, bright and modern

items.name: Neon Underglow Green
items.description: Acid green underglow rig pulsing in time with the engine idle. Scans as modified, not stock.
items.flavor_text: The green pulse matches the engine. The engine is proud. The pilot is louder.
items.art_prompt_hints: underhull neon light rig, acid green glow pulsing with engine rhythm, tuner-shop aesthetic, loud and customized

items.name: Neon Underglow Orange
items.description: Warm sunset-orange underglow, steady output, wide spill. Makes the hull feel landed-on.
items.flavor_text: Orange light under the hull says the ship has somewhere warm to go.
items.art_prompt_hints: underhull neon light rig, warm sunset orange wide glow spill, cruiser aesthetic, welcoming and grounded

items.name: Warp Bloom
items.description: Warp-entry bloom replacement: a soft white flower-bloom ring before the tunnel opens.
items.flavor_text: The warp agrees to open politely. The scanners note it. The pilot smiles.
items.art_prompt_hints: warp entry visual, soft white flower-bloom ring unfolding outward, gentle ceremony before tunnel, elegant

items.name: Scanner Pulse Cyan
items.description: Cyan active-scanner pulse ring expanding outward from the ship on scan-tick.
items.flavor_text: A ping so polite even the pirates pretend to not have noticed it.
items.art_prompt_hints: scanner ping visual, cyan expanding ring pulse outward from ship, tech-scanner aesthetic, calm and clinical

items.name: Scanner Pulse Red
items.description: Red hostile-tint scanner pulse that reads as a warning ping to other pilots within range.
items.flavor_text: The ping is red. Other pilots interpret that themselves, quickly.
items.art_prompt_hints: scanner ping visual, red expanding ring pulse outward from ship, hostile-warning aesthetic, aggressive ping

items.name: Scanner Pulse Purple
items.description: Purple scanner pulse with slow double-ring behavior. Feels expensive, even to the ship being scanned.
items.flavor_text: Violet sweep. The scanner is judging you and billing the target for its time.
items.art_prompt_hints: scanner ping visual, purple slow double-ring pulse outward, premium tech-scanner aesthetic, sophisticated

items.name: Chromatic Wake
items.description: Exhaust trail that splits into three color channels like a chromatic aberration filter on motion.
items.flavor_text: The trail came out of alignment with itself. Nobody complained. Fashion now.
items.art_prompt_hints: engine exhaust trail, split into red green blue chromatic aberration channels, glitchy and futuristic

items.name: Stardust Veil
items.description: Fine glittering stardust that hangs in a soft veil behind the ship, slowly dispersing.
items.flavor_text: The hull sheds a little sky every time it moves. Nobody owes anyone.
items.art_prompt_hints: engine exhaust trail, fine glittering stardust veil hanging and dispersing, soft celestial mood, elegant

items.name: Ion Corona Aura
items.description: Ion corona aura wrapping the ship at idle, pulses brighter at boost. Static arcs jump across panels.
items.flavor_text: Not always arcing. Only when the pilot would appreciate a photograph.
items.art_prompt_hints: hull-surrounding ion aura, pulsing corona with tesla arcs across panels, charged and dangerous, premium electric

items.name: Plasma Corona Aura
items.description: Magenta plasma corona aura with writhing edges and occasional flare loops thrown off the hull.
items.flavor_text: The aura looks decorative. The instruments disagree and lower the bid on repairs.
items.art_prompt_hints: hull-surrounding plasma aura, magenta corona with writhing edges and flare loops, hot energetic, signature-level

items.name: Gravity Well Effect
items.description: Subtle gravity-lens distortion halo around the ship. Bends starlight in a thin visible ring at speed.
items.flavor_text: Technically not a gravity well. Technically the stars noticed. Technically is enough.
items.art_prompt_hints: hull-surrounding gravity lens effect, thin distortion ring bending starlight, relativistic visual, mysterious and high-tech

items.name: Phase Shimmer
items.description: Hull shimmer effect that briefly ghosts the ship into a second phase outline during sharp turns.
items.flavor_text: The ship is in two places. Only one of them counts. Not the target.
items.art_prompt_hints: hull phase shimmer, ghosted secondary outline during sharp turn, spectral duplicate, evasive and sci-fi

items.name: Quantum Spark Trail
items.description: Exhaust trail speckled with bright quantum-spark pinpricks that flicker in and out of existence.
items.flavor_text: Sparks that may or may not have existed. The data log still argues.
items.art_prompt_hints: engine exhaust trail, bright quantum spark pinpricks flickering in and out, probabilistic and ethereal

items.name: Antimatter Exhaust
items.description: Deep violet antimatter exhaust with periodic annihilation flashes along the plume length.
items.flavor_text: Every flash is a small disagreement between particles. The engine survives anyway.
items.art_prompt_hints: engine exhaust trail, deep violet antimatter plume with periodic annihilation flashes, exotic-physics mood, premium

items.name: Aurora Legendary Trail
items.description: Rotating rainbow aurora trail that cycles through the full spectrum, wide ribbon, slow curl.
items.flavor_text: The sky gave up one of its best tricks. The hull learned it overnight.
items.art_prompt_hints: engine exhaust trail, rotating rainbow aurora ribbon cycling full spectrum, wide slow curl, legendary prestige

items.name: Event Horizon Trail
items.description: Trail that pulls in nearby starlight, bending it into a dark swirling ribbon behind the ship.
items.flavor_text: The stars lean in, uninvited. Something behind the engine is asking them.
items.art_prompt_hints: engine exhaust trail, dark swirling ribbon pulling in nearby starlight with gravitational bend, ominous legendary

items.name: Singularity Wake
items.description: Black-hole wake effect trailing the ship — a dark disk with accretion ring pulling in local space.
items.flavor_text: A singularity fits in a pocket, if the pocket is brave enough to carry it.
items.art_prompt_hints: hull-trailing effect, black hole wake with dark disk and bright accretion ring, gravitational lensing, mythic unreal
